summary:

- AI-driven cybersecurity demand and role as security layer for AI/LLM deployments (e.g., Anthropic Project Glasswing)
- Strong fiscal 2026 financial performance with ARR surpassing $5B, accelerating growth, earnings beats, and solid FY27 guidance
